name: HWM_TM_REP_M_COMP_TOIL_ATRBS_V
query: SELECT ToilAtrbs.tm_rep_atrb_id Toil_Repos_Atrb_id, ToilAtrbs.attribute_category Toil_Time_Type, ToilAtrbsUsg.usages_source_id, ToilAtrbsUsg.usages_source_version FROM HWM_TM_REP_ATRBS ToilAtrbs, hwm_tm_rep_atrb_usages ToilAtrbsUsg WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B WHERE TM_ATRB_FLD_ID = MASTER_ATTRIBUTE_ID AND name = 'CompensatoryTimeAbsencePlan' ) and ToilAtrbs.tm_rep_atrb_id = ToilAtrbsUsg.tm_rep_atrb_id
